findings.description: commentCount/danmakuCount gate skips analysis for users with zero counts but non-empty commentText from API
findings.fix: Added `nextCommentText.trim().length > 0` to the `hasComments` check so analysis runs when text content exists despite zero metadata counts

findings.description: responseCache in bilibiliCrawler.js has no eviction of expired entries, causing unbounded memory growth
findings.fix: Added pruneExpiredCacheEntries() called every 100th insert + eager delete of expired entries on lookup miss
